ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or identifier for the measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensors table */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., power, voltage, current) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (department manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the equipment belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., machine, motor, pump) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "warranty_date" TEXT /* Date of warranty expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, department head, maintenance personnel) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the departments table (user's department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Measurement the metadata belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor that collected the measurement */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment associated with the measurement */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the measurement belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement data (e.g., sensor, meter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_metadata_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high energy usage, low energy usage) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification has been sent */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment the maintenance is scheduled for */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Measurement that triggered the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, predictive) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the maintenance */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Measurement the report is based on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the energy usage belongs to */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment the energy usage is associated with */,
  "energy_usage" REAL /* Energy usage value */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the energy usage was recorded */,
  "peak_usage" REAL /* Peak energy usage value */,
  "average_usage" REAL /* Average energy usage value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy trend */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the energy trend belongs to */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment the energy trend is associated with */,
  "energy_usage" REAL /* Energy usage value */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the energy usage was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_trends_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_trends_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy forecast */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the energy forecast belongs to */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment the energy forecast is associated with */,
  "energy_usage" REAL /* Energy usage value */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the energy usage was forecasted */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecast_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecast_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
